Who We Are

Company Overview

Webronic Industries Private Limited is a global technology services company specializing in AI-driven digital transformation, cloud computing, and enterprise software development. Founded in 2010, we've grown from a small software development team in Chennai to a global organization serving over 500 clients across 50+ countries

AI-First Approach

Unlike traditional IT service companies, we embed artificial intelligence and machine learning across all our solutions. From predictive analytics in our ERP systems to computer vision in our retail automation platforms, AI isn't an add-on but fundamental to how we build technology

Product + Services Model

We're not just consultants but also product innovators. Our proprietary platforms (StoreTech, Tanlux, Value Charts) serve thousands of users globally, giving us real-time insights that inform our consulting and custom development work

Global Reach, Local Presence

Operating from India and Europe (through our partnership with Thingsatweb Sweden AB), we combine Indian innovation and cost-effectiveness with European quality standards and market access

Industry Specialization

We don’t try to be everything to everyone. Our deep expertise in manufacturing, retail, financial services, and healthcare allows us to deliver solutions that address industry-specific challenges with proven approaches

Our Core

Our Values

The principles that guide every decision we make

Innovation First

We continuously explore emerging technologies and incorporate them into our solutions. Our R&D investment exceeds industry averages

Client Success

Your success is our success. We measure ourselves not by projects delivered but by business outcomes achieved

Excellence in Execution

Quality isn’t negotiable. Our rigorous development processes and comprehensive testing ensure every solution meets the highest standards

Transparency & Integrity

We build long-term partnerships based on trust. Honest communication and ethical practices guide every client interaction

Continuous Learning

Technology evolves rapidly. Our team dedicates 10% of time to learning new technologies and earning certifications

Our Journey

Our Story

The Journey from Startup to Global Enterprise

2010

The Beginning

Webronic Industries was founded in Chennai by a team of software engineers passionate about using technology to solve real business problems. Our first project was a custom inventory management system for a local manufacturer

2010
2012-2014

Building Expertise

We expanded our service offerings into web development, mobile applications, and ERP systems. Early projects in manufacturing automation gave us deep expertise in Industry 4.0 technologies

2012-2014
2015

International Expansion

Secured our first international client and established operations in Madurai and Salem. This geographic expansion allowed us to tap into diverse talent pools across Tamil Nadu

2015
2016-2017

Product Innovation

Launched Value Charts, our business intelligence platform, marking our evolution from pure services to a product and services model. The platform gained traction with SMBs seeking affordable BI solutions

2016-2017
2018

European Market Entry

Partnered with Thingsatweb Sweden AB to serve European markets. This partnership provided access to Nordic and European clients while maintaining development efficiency in India

2018
2019-2020

Retail Automation Breakthrough

Developed StoreTech, our autonomous retail platform, initially for Swedish unmanned convenience stores. The platform’s success during COVID-19 accelerated adoption

2019-2020
2021

AI Practice Launch

Established dedicated AI/ML practice with partnerships with OpenAI, Google AI, and NVIDIA. Began delivering advanced AI solutions including computer vision quality inspection

2021
2022

Tanlux Platform

Launched Tanlux ERP specifically for tanning studios, demonstrating our ability to create vertical-specific solutions. Platform now powers autonomous tanning studios across Sweden

2022
2023-Present

Global Growth

Expanded to serve Fortune 500 enterprises while maintaining our startup agility. Our client portfolio now includes manufacturers, retailers, financial institutions, and healthcare providers across five continents

2023-Present

15+

Years Excellence

500+

Clients Global

3+

Countries

Transactions

Cloud Managed

Impact

Our Culture

Remote-First, People-Centered. We believe great work happens when people have flexibility and autonomy

Values in Action

Work-Life Balance

Flexible hours, unlimited time off, and respect for personal time ensure our team stays energized and motivated

Learning & Development

Annual learning budget for courses, conferences, and certifications. Regular internal knowledge-sharing sessions and tech talks

Diversity & Inclusion

Diverse team across backgrounds, genders, and locations. Inclusive culture where every voice is valued

Innovation Time

20% time for personal projects and exploration of new technologies. Many of our platform features originated from innovation time projects

Perks & Benefits

Competitive compensationHealth insuranceProfessional development budgetLatest technologyRegular eventsMentorshipCareer growth

Education Initiatives

  • Coding Bootcamps: 500+ students trained
  • Scholarship Programs: 20/year
  • Internship Programs: 50+/year

Environmental Commitment

  • Carbon Neutral Operations
  • Paperless Office (95% reduction)
  • E-Waste Recycling

Community Engagement

  • Technology for Good (Pro-bono)
  • Disaster Relief Support
  • Local Employment Priority
Why Us

Why Choose Webronic

The reasons enterprises and startups alike choose Webronic as their technology partner

1

Proven Track Record

15+ years delivering successful projects across industries and geographies

2

Technical Excellence

Deep expertise in AI/ML, cloud, IoT. 100+ professional certifications

3

Industry Knowledge

Specialized in manufacturing, retail, finance, and healthcare

4

End-to-End Services

Strategy, consulting, development, deployment, and support

5

Global Delivery

Cultural understanding with cost-effective development

6

Innovation Focus

Continuous investment in R&D and emerging technologies

7

Transparent Communication

Honest assessments and realistic commitments

8

Long-Term Partnership

Average client relationship exceeds 5 years
